title: Mserver5 crashes on nested SELECT
poc: CREATE TABLE x(b INT, c1 INT);
key_bug_features: Nested SELECT causes Mserver5 to crash
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(a INT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE x(b INT, c1 VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO x(b, c1) VALUES (1, 'one'), (2, 'two'), (3, NULL);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT c1, (SELECT COUNT(a) FROM t WHERE a = b) AS c2 FROM x) AS dummy WHERE c1 = c2;
